selections.exampleHtml:
PI 28
Feature Catalog
Core Revenue Management Capabilities
Roadmap Initiative Group
23,200
Total Hours
10
Initiatives
35
Features

Initiative Effort PI Status Priority Features
Registration
Party identifiers, org hierarchy, search enhancements
 11,866h PI 28 In Progress P1 14
Taxpayer Accounting
General ledger core, reconciliation & balance management
 8,064h PI28 In Analysis P1 9
Returns Processing
Filing workflows, validation rules, submission tracking & acknowledgements
 4,320h PI28 In Analysis P1 7
Payment Processing
Multi-channel payments, allocation rules & reconciliation engine
 3,200h PI29 In Analysis P1 6
Billing & Assessments
Instalment plans, assessment automation, billing cycles
 2,880h PI27 In Progress P2 6
Reporting & Analytics
Management dashboards, statutory reports, KPI tracking & exports
 1,760h PI29 In Progress P2 3
Penalty & Interest
Interest calculation, credit unallocated payment segments
 TBD PI29 To Do P2 4
Tax Accounts
Tax account setup, configurable thresholds, notifications
 TBD PI29 To Do P1 2
Debt Management
Debt recovery workflows, write-off management, enforcement actions
 TBD PI30 To Do P2 5
Audit & Compliance
Case management, audit trail logging, compliance monitoring & alerts
 TBD PI30 To Do P2 4
Business Value
Operational impact & delivery enablement
  • End-to-end taxpayer lifecycle management from registration through accounting and penalty enforcement
  • Automated billing, assessments & penalty calculations reduce manual caseworker effort across all tax types
  • Directly accelerates Greek project delivery and enables rapid reuse across future jurisdictions
Market Relevance
Strategic positioning & pipeline dependency
  • Core dependency for all current and pipeline Solon Tax implementations across multiple jurisdictions
  • Strengthens competitive position as a full-featured tax revenue management platform in active tenders
  • Platform completeness is a prerequisite condition cited in new-market RFP evaluation criteria
